base_url.description: Formbricks management API base URL. Defaults to the hosted app.formbricks.com instance; override for a self-hosted Formbricks deployment.

api_key.description: Formbricks management API key, sent as the X-API-Key request header.

survey_id.description: Optional survey id used to filter the responses stream with Formbricks' surveyId query parameter.

response_ids.description: Optional comma-separated response ids used by the response_details stream.
